# Voxaris

> Voxaris builds AI-optimized websites, runs AEO campaigns that get businesses cited by ChatGPT and Perplexity, and delivers personalized AI video outreach. Based in Orlando, FL, serving Florida businesses and marketing agencies.

## Company

- **Name:** Voxaris
- **Tagline:** Personalizing Your Outreach
- **Location:** Orlando, Florida, USA
- **Focus:** AI marketing infrastructure for local businesses + agencies
- **Home:** https://voxaris.io

## Products

### AEO Services — Answer Engine Optimization
- URL: https://voxaris.io/products/aeo
- Get your business cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, and Google AI Overviews
- LocalBusiness + FAQPage schema markup, entity optimization, llms.txt setup
- Monthly citation tracking across 5 AI platforms
- Starts with a **free AI Visibility Audit** at https://audit.voxaris.io (48-hour delivery)

### AI-Ready Website Builds
- URL: https://voxaris.io/products/websites
- Schema-complete, FAQ-structured websites built for AI citation
- **Live in 72 hours, $1,997 flat**
- Full JSON-LD schema architecture, question-phrased content, GBP optimization

### Talking Postcard
- URL: https://voxaris.io/products/talking-postcard
- AI-personalized video delivered as a physical postcard
- Each piece plays a unique video message addressed to the recipient (name, business, city, hook)
- Campaigns from 500 to 50,000 pieces
- Physical postcard + QR code → video landing page

## Who It's For

- Local service businesses in Florida that need to show up in AI answers
- Marketing agencies that want to resell AEO to their clients
- Car dealerships, home services, multi-location businesses

## Resources

- [Free AI Visibility Audit](https://audit.voxaris.io) — 48h delivery, no commitment

- [How It Works](https://voxaris.io/how-it-works)
